title: Wave-3 🟡: locale-switch smoke (hi/ml/es/de switch mechanism)
acceptance_criteria: Asserts the locale-switch MECHANISM only (D3): from the default en page, switching to each of hi, ml, es, de changes the URL locale segment and the rendered content is no longer the en string for a stable landmark (e.g. the hero heading) — NOT a full per-locale content audit (next-intl key presence is unit-tested).
Covers the locale-switcher component's switch behaviour across all 4 non-default locales in one spec.
No auth/seed; public landing page; tagged @functional per qa-checklist.md.
npm run typecheck passes; lists under playwright; no collision with other specs.
output_format: code plus a one-line note stating why this is mechanism-only, not a per-locale content audit
